release_review.summary: Runtime-control adds Desktop Model Source RPC so Desktop-managed SSH and container runtimes can use Local Environment model settings without SSH reverse forwards or provider-specific broker endpoints.
checked_surfaces: Desktop Model Source RPC connect, disconnect, status, and WebSocket frame protocol
Runtime Service desktop_model_source capability and binding normalization
Runtime AI model listing, model selection, thread title, run, and subagent paths for desktop:model_ identifiers
Desktop connector subprocess lifecycle for SSH and Runtime Placement Bridge runtimes
Desktop Runtime Lifecycle and Open Connection IPC progress split
Desktop SSH Open connection setup separated from SSH runtime install/start readiness
Desktop SSH startup without reverse forwarding or legacy broker binding
Runtime Placement Bridge runtime-control forwarding for Desktop Model Source RPC
Env App Flower model source grouping and unavailable-state copy
Runtime Service provider_link capability and binding normalization
Desktop startup reports and attachable runtime state runtime_control metadata
Runtime-control authorization, Desktop owner checks, and loopback-only exposure
Local UI health and runtime state token exposure boundaries
Legacy Desktop model HTTP binding endpoint removal
